item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸⚔️ Trump Threatens More Strikes on Iran After Regional Attacks
item.description: President Trump warned Iran would "pay the price" for delays in nuclear negotiations as Iranian forces struck US bases in Jordan and Bahrain. The US launched additional airstrikes on Iranian military sites.

item.title: 🇯🇵💹 Bank of Japan Set to Raise Key Rate to 1.0% in June
item.description: The BOJ will raise its benchmark interest rate this month and again in Q4, taking borrowing costs to 1.25% by year-end as it grows more wary of inflation risks. The yen strengthened on the prospect of tighter policy.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱💥 Israeli Airstrikes Kill 13 in Southern Lebanon
item.description: Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon killed at least 13 people as Israel pressed its campaign against Hezbollah. The Iran-backed group claimed fresh attacks against Israeli forces in the border region.

item.title: 🇲🇲🇺🇸 US Diplomat Found Dead in Myanmar, Thai Woman in Custody
item.description: A US State Department official was found dead in Yangon with a Thai woman in custody. The department confirmed the fatality but declined to provide additional details about the circumstances.

item.title: 🇵🇰💔 All Aboard Military Helicopter Killed in Pakistan Kashmir Crash
item.description: A Pakistani military helicopter crashed near Muzaffarabad in Pakistani Kashmir, killing all personnel on board. The military did not specify the number of casualties in the incident.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺🇪🇺 Russian and Ukrainian Drones Stray Into NATO Countries as Aerial War Spills Over
item.description: Drones launched by both Russia and Ukraine are veering off course, entering airspace of NATO members Lithuania and Romania, raising concerns about alliance escalation as the conflict's aerial dimension expands beyond combat zones.

item.title: 🛢️📉 OPEC Output at Lowest Since 2000 as US Blockade Squeezes Iran
item.description: OPEC oil production in May fell to its lowest level in over two decades as the US naval blockade cut Iran's exports and Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz disrupted shipments from other Gulf producers.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Taiwan Tests HIMARS Defense as China Watches
item.description: Taiwan conducted live-fire exercises with US-supplied HIMARS rocket systems to boost its defense capabilities against potential Chinese aggression. The drills come amid heightened cross-strait tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ US Iran War Live: Apache Downed Over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Apache helicopter shot down over Strait of Hormuz. US strikes continue on Iranian military sites. Trump says Iran must "pay the price" for delays in negotiations.

item.title: 💰📈 US Consumer Prices Rise in May as Expected
item.description: US consumer prices increased as expected in May, with inflation pressures continuing to challenge the Federal Reserve's efforts to bring price growth under control.

item.title: 🌍🍞 CNN: Iran War Could Cause Global Hunger Crisis
item.description: World Food Program warns that continued conflict with Iran could disrupt global food supplies, pushing millions into hunger as shipping routes through the Strait of Hormuz remain threatened.

item.title: 🇮🇷🕊️ Qatari Negotiators Travel to Tehran for US-Iran Talks
item.description: Qatari mediators arrived in Tehran to help bridge differences between Washington and Tehran as both sides seek to revive nuclear negotiations amid escalating military confrontation.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇮🇷 US Allies Condemn Iran's Lethal Plotting in Europe
item.description: Western governments accused Iran of orchestrating assassination and kidnapping plots across Europe, North America, and Australia, prompting coordinated diplomatic responses.

item.title: 🇾🇪💥 Cargo Vessel Exchanges Fire With Armed Craft Off Yemen
item.description: A commercial ship exchanged fire with unidentified armed vessels off the Yemeni coast, continuing maritime security concerns in the Red Sea region.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇺🇸 Taiwan Reverses Defense Industry Role with US
item.description: Taiwan is emerging as a drone exporter to the United States, reversing the traditional defense trade relationship as Taipei develops advanced unmanned systems for asymmetric warfare.

item.title: 🇰🇵🇨🇳 North Korea Claims Wins from Xi Visit
item.description: North Korea highlighted economic cooperation agreements from Kim Jong Un's meeting with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, though analysts note limits to what Beijing will offer Pyongyang.

item.title: 🇦🇷💰 Argentine Peso Drops Most in Eight Weeks
item.description: Argentina's currency fell sharply amid market concerns about the government's economic policies, reversing recent stability from the shock therapy program.

item.title: 🇵🇰🪖 Pakistan Military Helicopter Crashes in Kashmir, All Killed
item.description: A Pakistani military helicopter crashed near Muzaffarabad in Pakistani Kashmir, with all personnel on board confirmed dead. The cause remains under investigation.

item.title: 🇷🇺🏛️ Drones Hit Historic Museum in Annexed Crimea
item.description: Ukrainian drone strikes damaged a historic museum in Russian-annexed Crimea, leading officials to alter train schedules as attacks continue to disrupt the occupied peninsula.

item.title: 🇦🇫🇵🇰 Pakistan Airstrikes Kill at Least 13 in Afghanistan
item.description: Pakistan carried out airstrikes in Afghanistan that killed at least 13 people, the Taliban said, ending a month of relative calm along the disputed border.

item.title: 🇬🇧🏴 Anti-Immigrant Violence Erupts Across Belfast
item.description: Northern Ireland's capital saw widespread unrest following a stabbing incident, with anti-immigrant protests turning violent and raising tensions in the city.

item.title: 🛢️📈 Oil Rises Nearly 1% as US Launches New Strikes on Iran
item.description: Crude prices climbed as the US military conducted additional strikes against Iranian targets, tightening global supply concerns amid the ongoing Hormuz disruption.

item.title: 🇹🇷🇮🇱 Erdogan Says Israel's Attacks on Syria, Lebanon Threaten Turkey
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan warned that Israel's military operations against Syria and Lebanon pose a broader regional threat, including to Turkey's security interests.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸🇶🇦 Iran Denies Agreeing to New Talks as Trump Claims Negotiations Continue
item.description: Tehran rejected reports of agreeing to fresh nuclear negotiations while Washington insisted diplomatic channels remained open, highlighting conflicting signals as military escalation continues.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇪🇺 Ukraine Pushes for Europe to Build Ballistic Defense System
item.description: Ukraine urged European nations to develop a comprehensive ballistic missile defense system to counter Russian threats, citing lessons learned from the ongoing conflict.
